title: Smoky Yautia Fry
description: A flavorful and crispy dish made with yautia, smoky flavors, and a hint of spice.
instructions: Peel and slice the yautia into 1/2-inch thick rounds.
In a large bowl, mix together the smoky paprika, olive oil, fry sauce, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sliced yautia to the bowl and toss to coat evenly.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the yautia to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until crispy and golden brown.
